creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 173636
The output of gitlab:check

Following the major version upgrade instructions listed in port's pkg-message, upgrading from 8.8.7 to 8.9.6, the gitlab:check phase fails (and GitLab is broken, accessing it shows gateway error 500).

Attached is the output of

> rake gitlab:check --trace RAILS_ENV=production
